top_insights: The system rewards compliance; true leverage comes from building your own exit.
Most 'experts' are just repeating scripts. Real insight requires breaking the mold.
Wealth isn't found in degrees, but in the courage to self-teach.
Stop waiting for permission. Your hard reset starts the moment you act.
Insider truth is rarely popular. If everyone agrees, you're likely being sold a lie.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge popular beliefs or norms
Insight-driven reveals of hidden truths or insider perspectives
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique experience
angles: Expose the 'real' story behind popular events or figures using insider logic
Frame self-improvement as a radical act of independence against a failing system
Use specific, high-stakes personal anecdotes to illustrate broader economic or social truths
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's skepticism or alternative views
Aspiration towards independence, wealth, and success
Trust in the author's unique access to truth or expertise
emerging_narrative: A shift towards individual empowerment and skepticism of established institutions, where success is framed as a result of self-reliance, insider knowledge, and breaking away from mainstream narratives. Audiences are resonating with stories that validate their desire for autonomy and expose 'hidden' realities behind public events or figures.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge popular beliefs or norms
Insight-driven reveals of hidden truths or insider perspectives
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique experience
